recommendations.title: Mr. Devil
recommendations.overview: In 1950s Italy, a government official arrives in a rural town to investigate a grisly child murder. The culprit is a young boy who claims he acted in order to kill the Devil itself.

recommendations.title: Christmas Present
recommendations.overview: On Christmas night, four estranged friends reunite to rip off a wealthy businessman in a game of poker, but old grudges get in the way.

recommendations.title: Christmas Rematch
recommendations.overview: 15 years after that fateful card game on Christmas Eve, Franco gets his onetime friends back at the poker table for the rematch and a long-awaited payback.

recommendations.title: Giovanna's Father
recommendations.overview: Michele Casali is a middle-class professor in Fascist Italy who teaches at the same high school attended by his only daughter, Giovanna. A shy and sensitive girl, her insecurities are only magnified by Michele's overprotectiveness—reaching a point of

recommendations.title: Altar
recommendations.overview: A young family find themselves in serious danger when they move to an isolated haunted house in the Yorkshire Moors.

recommendations.title: Post Mortem
recommendations.overview: A post mortem photographer and a little girl confront ghosts in a haunted village after the First World War.

recommendations.title: Marrowbone
recommendations.overview: A young man and his three younger siblings are plagued by a sinister presence in the sprawling manor in which they live.

recommendations.title: The Wailing
recommendations.overview: A stranger arrives in a little village and soon after a mysterious sickness starts spreading. A policeman is drawn into the incident and is forced to solve the mystery in order to save his daughter.

recommendations.title: The Clinic
recommendations.overview: While traveling across country with her fiancé, Beth wakes alone in an isolated clinic to a mother's worst nightmare. Just how far will she go to save her child?

recommendations.title: Death Whisperer
recommendations.overview: When a remote village is plagued by a deadly curse, one brother must fight to save his family from a terrifying supernatural threat.
